chapters.title: Introduction to Ruby
chapters.description: Learn the basics of Ruby, a dynamic, open source programming language with a focus on simplicity and productivity.

chapters.title: Variables & Data Types
chapters.description: Store data using variables and learn about Ruby's fundamental data types: Numbers, Strings, and Booleans.

chapters.title: Control Flow
chapters.description: Make decisions in your code using if/else statements, unless, and case statements.

chapters.title: Loops & Iterators
chapters.description: Repeat actions easily with Ruby's powerful loops and iterators like while, times, and each.

chapters.title: Methods
chapters.description: Group code into reusable blocks called methods. Learn about arguments, return values, and scope.

chapters.title: Arrays
chapters.description: Store ordered lists of data. Master Array creation, indexing, modification, and common array methods.

chapters.title: Hashes & Symbols
chapters.description: Understand key-value pairs with Hashes and learn why Symbols are Ruby's perfect hash keys.

chapters.title: Blocks, Procs & Lambdas
chapters.description: Master Ruby's closures. Learn how to pass blocks of code to methods for ultimate flexibility.

chapters.title: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
chapters.description: Dive into OOP! Create classes, define instances, and use instance variables and methods.

chapters.title: Advanced OOP
chapters.description: Explore class inheritance, super, modules, and mixins to write DRY, elegant Ruby code.

chapters.title: Error Handling
chapters.description: Keep your programs running smoothly when things go wrong using begin, rescue, and ensure.

chapters.title: The Enumerable Module
chapters.description: Unlock the true power of Ruby collections using map, select, reduce, and other Enumerable methods.
